hooks.command: cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && git fetch origin main --quiet 2>/dev/null && LOCAL=$(git rev-parse main 2>/dev/null) && REMOTE=$(git rev-parse origin/main 2>/dev/null) && if [ "$LOCAL" != "$REMOTE" ]; then echo '⚠ Vault is behind remote. Run: git pull origin main'; fi; exit 0
